{{CargoOrgan
|name=Warp Horn
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10843
|idx=48
|description=This seemingly normal horn can change the curvature of objects. It doesn't deal immediate damage but will produce a dent around the contact point after being stuck into something.
|skill=
|hp=1414
|def=147
|atk=212
|rush=131
|gene1=Home Facility Resource Max Cap +5%
|gene2=Home Facility Resource Outputs +5%
|gene3=Home Facility Resource Max Cap +5%
|gene4=Home Facility Resource Outputs +5%
|gene7=Species War Cabin Output +10% (Awakened)
|}}
